snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the worldвАЩs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chhota  Farmani Naaz  Nagin Si Lugai  New haryanvi Song   The Prince Yadav
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | а§®а§Ња§Ча§® а§Єа•А а§≤а•Ба§Ча§Ња§И 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Shiva  Panchal

Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri

snippet.title: #RƒАKƒАSƒА Teaser | Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika | Manasa Sharma | Niharika Konidela | Zee Studios
snippet.description:
Watch the official #RaakaasaaTeaser now! A fantasy-comedy starring Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika. #RƒБkƒБsƒБ In Cinemas April 3, 2026 рЯТ•
вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶вА¶
Rakasa (formerly #PEP2) is a fantasy-comedy film from Pink Elephant Pictures, produced by Niharika Konidela and Zee Studios, directed by Manasa Sharma. Blending imaginative fantasy with engaging humour for audiences of all ages.

Featuring a fresh and exciting pairing of Sangeeth Shobhan and Nayan Sarika in the lead roles, Vennela Kishore, Brahmaji, Tanikella Bharani, Ashish Vidyarthi, Getup Srinu, Sukhwinder Singh, Anoop Singh, Vasu Inturi, Rohini, Rohan Roy.

A Niharika Konidela Production

Producers: Niharika Konidela & Umesh Kumar Bansal

snippet.title: TOXIC (2026) - Trailer | Rocking Star Yash | Akshay Kumar | Tara Sutaria  | Fan Made AI
snippet.description:
TOXIC (2026) вАУ Trailer brings together Rocking Star Yash, Akshay Kumar, and Tara Sutaria in an intense fan made AI cinematic universe packed with style, action, and high-voltage drama.

The trailer opens with Yash arriving in ultimate style in his luxurious Rolls Royce, heading straight toward a grand royal palace where Akshay Kumar rules like a mysterious kingpin. But this meeting is not easy. Akshay KumarвАЩs golden mask gangster army is already waiting to stop Yash before he can step inside the palace walls.

What follows is a brutal and stylish action sequence where Yash takes down waves of masked gangsters with pure mass energy and fearless attitude. Each frame is loaded with elevation shots, slow-motion fight sequences, powerful background score, and larger-than-life cinematic moments.

As the chaos settles, the final scene builds intense suspense вАФ Yash finally comes face to face with Akshay Kumar. Two powerful personalities. One silent battlefield. Guns raised. Eyes locked. The ultimate showdown begins.

This fan made AI trailer imagines a stylish action thriller filled with luxury, danger, betrayal, and dominance. The visuals are created purely for entertainment and are not related to any official movie announcement.

If you enjoy mass action trailers, cinematic AI concepts, and powerful face-off moments, support the video with a like, share, and subscribe for more epic fan made creations.

Namun pertemuan ini tidak mudah. вАЛвАЛPasukan gangster bertopeng emas Akshay Kumar sudah menunggu untuk menghentikan Yash sebelum ia dapat memasuki tembok istana.

Yang selanjutnya adalah adegan aksi brutal dan penuh gaya di mana Yash menghabisi gelombang gangster bertopeng dengan energi luar biasa dan sikap tanpa takut. Setiap frame dipenuhi dengan pengambilan gambar dari ketinggian, adegan pertarungan slow-motion, musik latar yang kuat, dan momen sinematik yang luar biasa.

Saat kekacauan mereda, adegan terakhir membangun ketegangan yang intens вАФ Yash akhirnya berhadapan langsung dengan Akshay Kumar. Dua kepribadian yang kuat. Satu medan perang yang sunyi. Senjata terangkat. Mata terkunci. Pertarungan pamungkas dimulai.

Trailer AI buatan penggemar ini membayangkan sebuah film thriller aksi penuh gaya yang dipenuhi kemewahan, bahaya, pengkhianatan, dan dominasi. Visualnya dibuat murni untuk hiburan dan tidak terkait dengan pengumuman film resmi apa pun.

snippet.title: Holi Khele Masane Mein | Malini Awasthi | Latest Holi Songs | Holi Ke Gane | Holi 2026
snippet.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva вАФ the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi вАФ one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.

#HoliSong #ShivHoli #MaliniAwasthi #Mahadev #BholeNath #DevotionalSongs #FolkHoli #ShivBhajan #HoliSpecial #holikhelemasanemein #holikhelemasanemeinsong #masanekiholi

а§За§Є а§Єа§Ва§Ха§≤а§® а§Ѓа•За§В, а§єа§Ѓа§®а•З а§Еа§Ѓа§ња§§а§Ња§≠ а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа§® а§Ха•З а§Йа§® а§Ца§Ња§Є а§Ча§Ња§®а•Ла§В а§Ха•Л а§ґа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤ а§Ха§ња§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И а§Ьа•Л а§Жа§™а§Ха•З а§єа•Ла§≤а•А а§Ха•З а§§а•На§ѓа•Ма§єа§Ња§∞ а§Ха•Л а§Фа§∞ а§≠а•А а§ѓа§Ња§¶а§Ча§Ња§∞ а§ђа§®а§Њ а§¶а•За§Ва§Ча•За•§ а§ѓа•З а§Ча§Ња§®а•З а§® а§Єа§ња§∞а•На§Ђ а§Ѓа§®а•Ла§∞а§Ва§Ьа§® а§Ха§∞а§§а•З а§єа•Иа§В, а§ђа§≤а•На§Ха§њ а§єа§Ѓа•За§В а§Ьа•Аа§µа§® а§Ха•З а§єа§∞ а§™а§≤ а§Ха•Л а§Ца•Ба§ґа•А а§Єа•З а§Ьа•Аа§®а•З а§Ха•А а§™а•На§∞а•За§∞а§£а§Њ а§≠а•А а§¶а•За§§а•З а§єа•Иа§Ва•§ а§§а•Л а§Жа§За§ѓа•З, а§За§Є а§Єа§Ва§Ча•Аа§§а§Ѓа§ѓ а§Єа§Ђа§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§єа§Ѓа§Ња§∞а•З а§Єа§Ња§• а§Ьа•Ба§°а§Ља§ња§П а§Фа§∞ а§Ѓа§єа§Єа•Ва§Є а§Ха•Аа§Ьа§ња§П а§Йа§Є а§¶а•Ма§∞ а§Ха•А а§Ѓа§Єа•На§§а•А а§Фа§∞ а§Ьа§Ња§¶а•В а§Ха•Ла•§

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: De Daru De Daru | Karma (1986) | Kishore Kumar, Manhar Udhas | Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Details :
Star Cast : Dilip Kumar, Nutan, Naseeruddin Shah, Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor, Anupam Kher, Sridevi, Poonam Dhillon
Singers : Kishore Kumar, Mahendra Kapoor, Manhar Udhas
Music Director :  Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyrics by: Anand Bakshi
Producer & Director: Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

De Daru, De Daru, O Mere Bhaiya De Daru
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Kyaa saagar hain kyaa minaa hain
Ye peena bhi koi peena hain
Peena hain peena hain
Peena hain to munh se lagaakar
Botal peene de daaru
De  dada o mere bhaiya re de daaru
De daaru botal se peene de daaru
Are bade dinon ke
Baad mili hain ye daaru
Are hosh rahe na
Baaki saaqi de daaru
O mere bhaiya de daaru

Ye andar baahar hone do
Hamen hansane do hamen rone do
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab kante pe tul jaa enge
Ham bure sahi par achchhe hain
Kyonki ham dil ke sachche hain
Are jooth kahen to jaan hamaari
Le daaru o mere bhaiya de daaru

One peg two peg three peg four peg
Ham peg pikar hosh mein aae hain
Haan ab ham josh mein aae hain
Paani mein aag milaai hain
Kuchh garmi khuun mein aayi hain
Masti sar chadhake bolegi
Ab gori ghuunghat kholegi
Wo haath kisi ke pade nahin
Hum bade dinon se lade nahin
Are aaj kisi ko maarenge de daaru
Are detaa jaa daaru re
O mere bhaiya de daaru.

snippet.title: Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi | Holi Special Song | Rudrasync | Official Music 2026
snippet.description:
Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi | Holi Special Song | Rudrasync | Official Music 2026

Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi ek anokha, divya aur aatma ko chhoo jaane wala Holi special bhajan hai вАФ
jahaan rang sirf dharti par nahi,
balki Kailash ke shikhar par bhi baraste hain рЯПФпЄПрЯМИрЯРШ

Yeh geet us kalpana ko jeevant karta hai
jahaan barf se dhake Kailash par
bhakti ki garmi hai,
prem ke rang hain,
aur Ganpati Bappa khud muskurate hue Holi khel rahe hain вЬ®рЯЩП

Jahaan Shiv ka vaas hai,
jahaan shanti ka aakash hai,
wahin jab Bappa ke saath rang ghul jaate hain вАФ
toh Holi sirf tyohar nahi rehti,
ek divya utsav ban jaati hai рЯФ±рЯМЄ

рЯТЫ Essence of the Track
вАЬKailash Mein Bappa Ki HoliвАЭ darshaata hai:
рЯПФпЄП Bhakti jo har sthaan pavitra kar de
рЯРШ Bappa jo har utsav ke saathi hain
рЯМИ Rang jo shanti ke saath ghule ho
рЯЩП Holi jo adhyatmik anubhav ban jaaye

рЯОІ What You Will Feel
рЯПФпЄП Kailash ki Shanti
рЯМИ Divine Holi Energy
рЯРШ Ganpati Bappa ka Anokha Roop
рЯЩП Bhakti + Utsav ka Balance
вЬ® Inner Joy & Calm

рЯО§ Credits
Artist: RudraSync
Album Label: Neel & Surbhi Records
Music Composer:- Surbhi Sharma
Lyrics:- Surbhi Sharma
Editing By:- Surbhi Sharma
Genre: Devotional вАҐ Festive вАҐ Divine
Track: Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi
Release Year: 2026

snippet.title: Flatbed Truck McQueen | Transportation with Truck - Pothole vs Car #28 | BeamNG.Drive Gameplay
snippet.description:
Welcome to another exciting BeamNG.Drive gameplay video! In this episode, we transport Lightning McQueen using a flatbed truck through dangerous roads full of potholes. Will McQueen survive the brutal terrain? Watch to find out!

рЯЪЫ Flatbed Truck Simulation  
рЯЪЧ Pothole vs Car Physics Test  
вЪ°пЄП Lightning McQueen in BeamNG.Drive  
рЯФ• Realistic Car Crashes and Damage  
рЯОЃ BeamNG.Drive Truck Transport Challenge  

This video showcases realistic crash physics, vehicle transport simulation, and thrilling challenges with a flatbed truck in BeamNG.Drive. Perfect for fans of car crashes, truck driving, and Lightning McQueen mods!

рЯУМ DonвАЩt forget to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more BeamNG content!

MINECRAFT HORROR STORY

What is Alta School of Technology?
Alta School of Technology is a new-age engineering school designed to prepare students for
real tech careers, not just exams.
It offers an AI-first Experiential Computer Science through UGC & AICTE-approved partner
universities.
Alta focuses on:
вЧП Coding from Day One with personal MacBook
вЧП Real-world projects & product building
вЧП Industry-aligned curriculum instead of outdated theory
Entrance Exam & Important Dates (ASAT)
вЧП Exam Name: ASAT (Alta Scholastic Aptitude Test)
вЧП Mode: Online
вЧП Eligibility: Class 12th (PCM), minimum 50% aggregate
вЧП ASAT 2026: Conducted in multiple slots
Last date for registration is 13th March, 2026
Early applicants usually get better scholarship opportunities.

snippet.title: Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe ( Holi Rasiya ) Satveer Gujjar | Ramhans Tanwar | Mannu Pahari | Holi Song
snippet.description:
рЯМЄ Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe | Official Holi Rasiya | Mannu Pahari рЯМЄ  

Holi ke rang, desi masti aur gaon ki asli vibe lekar aa gaya hai ek dhamakedaar Rasiya вАФ вАЬRang Mere Gore Galan PeвАЭ рЯОґ  

Is gaane ko pure dil se shoot kiya gaya hai hamare apne Gaon Pahari ki mitti mein, jahan ke logon ka pyaar aur support is video ki sabse badi taqat raha. Isme Team Makkari ke talented artists ne apni energy aur acting se Holi ke asli rang screen par utaar diye hain.  

Ye sirf ek song nahi, balki gaon ki Holi, dosti, hasi-mazaak aur rangon ki khushi ka celebration hai вАФ jahan har frame mein desi culture aur festive vibe mehsoos hogi.  

рЯФ• а§Еа§Ча§∞ video pasand aaye to Like рЯСН, Share рЯУ≤ aur Channel ko Subscribe zaroor karein вАФ Mannu Pahari ko support karte rahein.

localized.title: Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe ( Holi Rasiya ) Satveer Gujjar | Ramhans Tanwar | Mannu Pahari | Holi Song
localized.description:
рЯМЄ Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe | Official Holi Rasiya | Mannu Pahari рЯМЄ  

Holi ke rang, desi masti aur gaon ki asli vibe lekar aa gaya hai ek dhamakedaar Rasiya вАФ вАЬRang Mere Gore Galan PeвАЭ рЯОґ  

Is gaane ko pure dil se shoot kiya gaya hai hamare apne Gaon Pahari ki mitti mein, jahan ke logon ka pyaar aur support is video ki sabse badi taqat raha. Isme Team Makkari ke talented artists ne apni energy aur acting se Holi ke asli rang screen par utaar diye hain.  

Ye sirf ek song nahi, balki gaon ki Holi, dosti, hasi-mazaak aur rangon ki khushi ka celebration hai вАФ jahan har frame mein desi culture aur festive vibe mehsoos hogi.

snippet.title: Holi | Sharry Mann | Tenu Rang Laun Layi | Holi Special Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026
snippet.description:
Holi | Sharry Mann | Tenu Rang Laun Layi | Holi Special Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026

Artist - Sharry Maan
Song - Holi
Music - Gurmit Singh
Directed By Aditya Sood
Produced By Adityas Films
Label - Speed Records

|| Lyrics ||

Holi wale din bullet da silencer hai laa leya,
Ni mAi Tarke tarke lighteyan te chlaan v karwa leya,
teri Gori gall ute das kehra rang lawa,
tere velly di hai jid,
Tere Yaar di hai jid,
Holi Tere naal manava,

Holi HAI !!
HOLI Hai !!

oh ghar tere shauni baneya,
yaar bullet te aawe Taneya, (x2)
Jado Rokeya, rokeya, Rokeya mohali wale road te,
tenu rang laun de layi,
rusi nu manaon de layi, (x2)
oh yaar aa geya aae naake saare tor ke,
aa geya ae nake sare torh k,
tenu rang laun de layi, (x2)

Holi HAI !!
HOLI Hai !!

Rakha kide vich damm jehra rokda,
jatt kala kala aaonda piche thokda, (x2)
hath wadyea, vadeya, badeya shikariyan ne Jorh te,

tenu rang laun de layi,
rusi nu manaon de layi, (x2)
oh yaar aa geya aae naake saare tor ke,
aa geya ae nake sare torh k,
tenu rang laun de layi, (x2)

Holi HAI !!
HOLI Hai !!
tags: sharry maan yaar bullet te aave
tenu rang laun de layi sharry maan
